name: Tax Deferral on Exercise of Statutory Stock Options

eligibility.description: The individual must meet the employment and holding period requirements (generally 2 years from grant and 1 year from exercise) and the option must qualify under section 422 or 423.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes from gross income any compensation realized upon the exercise of an Incentive Stock Option (ISO) or an Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP) option, provided holding period requirements are met.
